selection_basis: ge31-rich high-shortwave/hot forcing day with official WBGT GE31 observations in the available v09 paired station file
rationale: Selected as the highest available 3-hour shortwave forcing day with GE31-rich official-WBGT support in the available source.

selection_basis: contrast day for humidity/cloud/diffuse/radiation diversity; official GE31 observations are unavailable in the local paired station file and the day is not treated as GE31-rich
